name: Paul Mitchell
tweet: Auditors said the Army, Navy, and Air Force could account for the existence and completeness of major military equipment. • However, auditors found many material weaknesses including Property, Plant, and Equipment; Inventory; IT Systems Security; and Financial Reporting.  (4/5)

name: Paul Mitchell
tweet: I wanted to share some of the results of the audit with you:  • Auditors did not report any material weaknesses for civilian or military pay. • Auditors said they found no evidence of fraud. (3/5)
